title: user_record
description: One identity in a user directory. Cross-source: aws.iam, okta, github (members), Azure AD (future). Sources that emit this type must populate the required fields; optional fields document semantics across implementations.

id.description: Unique within the emitting source (e.g. AWS IAM UserId, Okta user id, GitHub user id).

mfa_enabled.description: True iff at least one MFA factor is enrolled and required at sign-on.
